I've now created a new campaign, tried to get those ads approved and they're still not getting approved. There's another thing that we can do. You want to come over to Business Manager, click Business Settings. It should pop up and take you into a new page. And then from there, what we're going to do is we're going to come over here to Ad Accounts. Excuse me. And then once it loads up, we are going to click Add, create a new account. And then pretty straightforward and simple. You can put your username, add account to or whatever you want to signify that it's the new one. It's not going to click through for me because I have not ran ads on this account in a while. And it won't let you create new ad accounts unless you're running ads. So more than likely if you're currently running ads, spending money, it will let you create that new ad account. After this, what you're going to want to do is go through the same thing, create a new pixel, new custom conversion and add it the same way. I'm going to leave a link below on how to do that. It's just going to take you back through the original training. If you know how great, if not, just do this, then click the link below and then try to get your ads approved again. And there is still one more thing we can try if this does not work, but it's a bit more to do. So try this out first and hopefully it works. If not, I will see you in the next video.
